location: Metropolitan Correctional Center, New York NY
text: MCC log: Epstein on suicide watch but allowed legal visits in regular clothes — guard questioned the arrangement

location: Metropolitan Correctional Center, New York NY
text: Internal MCC record documents Epstein suicide watch conditions with special visit protocols in July 2019
Bureau of Prisons memo: Epstein placed in Administrative Detention at MCC New York on July 29, 2019.
BOP 302: doctor visited Epstein in Special Housing Unit at MCC Thursday before he was transported to hospital.
BOP log: officer detailed to New York Presbyterian Hospital emergency room where inmate Epstein remained on Aug 10, 2019.
